title: Wingspan
description: A bald eagle, both talons still on the branch, the rest of him already somewhere else entirely.
longDescription:
There is a moment, just before a bald eagle fully commits to flight, where everything is in motion and nothing has left yet. Wings up, talons releasing, eyes already locked on somewhere else. That moment lasts a fraction of a second.

This is that moment.

A full adult bald eagle launching from a bare tree against a wide open sky. No distractions, no clutter. Just the bird and the decision it already made.

I photograph wildlife the way I believe it should be done. No bait, no calls, no disturbance. I position myself, I wait, and I let the moment come. This one came fast. I was ready.

No eagles were bothered in the making of this photograph.
tools: Tools: Sony a1 II, Sony 600mm f/4 GM with 2x teleconverter & Lightroom Classic
